title: Error reading properties of null in Voiceflow API integration
symptom: When attempting to connect Voiceflow to WeWeb via a POST API call, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of null (reading ‘reduce’)'. This indicates a failure in processing the API response or request data.
applies_when: Making a POST request with JSON data
not_this_if: The API call is successful without errors
root_cause: This error typically occurs when the API response is not as expected, leading to attempts to access properties of a null object. This can happen if the request body is not formatted correctly or if the API does not return the expected data structure.
fix_steps: Ensure the request body is set to raw JSON format
Double-check the structure of the JSON data being sent
agent_instruction: Set the request body to raw JSON format and verify the JSON structure before retrying the API call.
